Definition Sph1_rec_beta_loop (P : Type) (b : P) (p : b = b)
    : ap (Sph1_rec P b p) (merid North @ (merid South)^) = p.

goals.conclusion: ap (Sph1_rec P b p) (merid North @ (merid South)^) = p
ap (Sph1_rec P b p) (merid North @ (merid South)^) = p
ap (Sph1_rec P b p) (merid North) @ ap (Sph1_rec P b p) (merid South)^ = p
ap (Sph1_rec P b p) (merid North) @ (ap (Sph1_rec P b p) (merid South))^ = p
Susp_rec p 1 Empty_rec North @ (Susp_rec p 1 Empty_rec South)^ = p

#[export] Instance sgop_s1 : SgOp (psphere 1)
    := fun x y => Sph1_rec _ y (s1_turn y) x.

contents: (* [Univalence] implies that S^1 is 1-truncated, which means that any two parallel 2-paths are equal.  This lets us trivialize some path algebra in the following results.  Is it possible to prove these results without [Univalence]? *)

Associative sgop_s1
